Ansible Deployment Playbook: This playbook automates the deployment of the application to a fleet of Ubuntu 22.04 servers, covering package installation, service configuration, and zero-downtime rolling restarts. Tasks are organized into roles: common (base packages and security hardening), app (application deployment and configuration), and monitoring (Prometheus node exporter and Filebeat installation). The rolling_update strategy deploys to one host at a time, validates health via a curl to the /healthz endpoint, and aborts the playbook if a health check fails after deployment. Sensitive values such as database passwords and API keys are encrypted with Ansible Vault and decrypted at runtime using a vault password file.
